assumptions: The numeric column AAPL_Stock_Price was mapped to Website_Visits to comply with the required output schema.
Outliers were identified using the IQR rule: values below Q1 - 1.5*IQR or above Q3 + 1.5*IQR on the AAPL_Stock_Price series.
Dates are assumed valid ISO 8601 strings (YYYY-MM-DD); no date parsing or correction was required.
No missing values were present in the provided CSV snippet; therefore, no imputation or row removal for nulls was needed.
Descriptive statistics (mean, median, std, min, max) are computed strictly on the cleaned dataset after removing the detected outliers.
validation_notes: Outlier Removal Check: Passed. The cleaned_data_rows array does not contain the values 7.12 or 950.75 that were flagged as outliers and listed in detected_outliers and removed_rows.

Statistical Validity Check: Passed. The statistics (count=8, mean≈180.93, median≈181.205, std≈13.07, min=160.43, max=199.32) were recomputed using only the 8 cleaned observations, excluding the two removed outliers.
